title: PhysWorldLM Universal Entity
description: Canonical Entity schema for PhysWorldLM (PW-ENTITY v1.0). Every object that can exist in a WorldSpec simulation — physical, virtual, logical, living, static, dynamic, composite, abstract — inherits from this schema.

EulerAngles.description: Euler angles in degrees. Convention: roll-pitch-yaw (XYZ extrinsic).

Transform.description: Full spatial transform of an entity.

parent_id.description: Entity whose local space this transform is relative to.

principal_inertia.description: Principal moments of inertia (Ixx, Iyy, Izz).

mesh_lod.description: LOD meshes from highest to lowest detail.

Material.description: Physical and visual material of an entity surface.

ComponentBase.description: Base definition for any component attached to an entity.

HealthSpec.description: Structural health, damage, and survivability state.

step_height_m.description: Max step height for ground vehicles.

AISpec.description: AI control, perception, and autonomy specification.

autonomy_level.description: SAE-like autonomy level adapted for military/robotics systems.

memory_duration_s.description: How long entity remembers perceived objects.

SimulationSpec.description: Simulation engine properties for this entity.

sleep_distance_m.description: Distance from camera at which entity enters sleep state.

engine_specific.description: Engine-specific overrides. Keys are engine names.

RuntimeState.description: Current runtime state of the entity.

ResourceSet.description: All resource levels of this entity.

valid_from_s.description: Simulation time this relationship becomes valid.

EventBinding.description: An event this entity can emit or listen to.

handler_ref.description: Reference to event handler script or BT node.

SecurityContext.description: Access control and security properties of this entity record.

iff_code.description: Identification Friend or Foe transponder code.

id.description: Globally unique persistent entity identifier. Never reused.

namespace.description: Ontology or system namespace this entity belongs to.

template_id.description: Prototype/prefab template this entity was instantiated from.

instance_of.description: Ontology class this is an instance of.

ground_truth_class_id.description: Integer class for CV ground truth annotation.

metadata.description: Full entity metadata. Conforms to metadata.schema.json.

components.description: All subsystems and components attached to this entity.

sensors.description: All sensors equipped on this entity.

weapons.description: All weapon systems of this entity.

communications.description: All communication systems of this entity.

event_bindings.description: Events this entity emits or listens to.

constraints.description: Physical and logical constraints involving this entity.

mission_ids.description: IDs of missions assigned to this entity.

organization_id.description: ID of the Organization this entity belongs to.

created_at_sim_s.description: Simulation time in seconds when this entity was created.

custom_extensions.description: Domain-specific fields not covered by the base schema. Use reverse-domain keys.

_extensions_schema_ref.description: URI of the JSON Schema validating these extensions.
